title: USCIS waives COVID-19 vaccination requirement for Adjustment of Status applicants
description_html:
USCIS published a notification stating that it will waive the requirement for adjustment of status applicants to provide proof of COVID-19 vaccination on Form I-693, effective January 22, 2025. USCIS will also not issue any Request for Evidence or Notice of Intent to Deny related to missing COVID-19 vaccination documentation.
